content.claim: The 2010–2026 FIDESZ-KDNP coalition government explicitly embraced educational stratification as ideological policy, with a 2012-era human-resources minister stating the government would pursue 'affectionate segregation' on the grounds that lower-income pupils are less educationally able.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: This describes past government ideology, not current coalition composition or likely reversibility under new government
The rhetorical/ideological claim does not directly measure voter support for segregation among broader FIDESZ electorate or public
The 14-year tenure shows entrenchment but does not measure specific political cost of reversal
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
